visual_description: A man in glasses and a dark robe sits at a table with condiments and a bottle, looking forward. Behind him, another man in a green shirt moves past, partially obscuring the view. A person in a white shirt walks through the background, carrying a tray.
audio_description: The audio features a high-pitched, fast-paced, and breathy voice with a gasp.
